name: Impossible Tuna Melt Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Cook and stir onions and margarine in a skillet over low heat until onions are light brown.
3. Sprinkle tuna, 1 cup of the cheese, and onions into a greased pie plate.
4. In a bowl, beat eggs, milk, baking mix, salt, and pepper for 15 seconds with a blender on high or stir for 1 minute with a hand blender.
5. Pour the mixture over the toppings in the pie plate.
6. Bake for 25 minutes.
7. Sprinkle remaining cheese over the top of the pie, stopping about 1 inch from the edge.
8. Continue baking for 5 to 8 minutes longer or until a knife inserted into the center comes out clean (the pie can be done even if some melted cheese adheres to the knife).
(wrv)
